settings.address: No 3, Olokuta adjacent Train Station, Abeokuta, Ogun State

hero.description: Bespoke fashion design crafted with precision, passion, and purpose. Every stitch tells your story.

about.title: Crafting Elegance, One Thread at a Time
paragraphs: Zekiel Apparel was born from a deep love of fashion and a commitment to celebrating individuality. We believe that clothing is more than fabric — it is an expression of identity, confidence, and culture.
Founded over a decade ago, our atelier has grown from a small tailoring studio into a full-service fashion house trusted by hundreds of clients across Nigeria and beyond.
Whether you come to us with a clear vision or need guidance to find your style, we partner with you every step of the way.

values.title: Quality First
values.description: We never compromise on the quality of materials or craftsmanship. Every piece must meet our exacting standards.

values.title: Individuality
values.description: No two clients are the same, and neither are our designs. We celebrate what makes you unique.

values.title: Integrity
values.description: Transparent, honest, and reliable. From pricing to timelines, we keep our word and build lasting relationships.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: We blend traditional tailoring techniques with modern design trends, pushing creative boundaries.

team.name: Johnson Bidemi Makinde
team.bio: With a passion for fashion and a vision for elegance, Johnson founded Zekiel Apparel to celebrate individuality through bespoke design and expert craftsmanship.

team.name: Sunday Samson Oretuyi
team.bio: Sunday's mastery of pattern-making and construction is the backbone of our quality. His eye for detail ensures every garment fits like a second skin.

team.name: Mr Elijah
team.bio: Mr Elijah guides clients through their style journey with warmth and expertise, turning visions into wearable reality.

services.title: Custom Design
services.description: Work one-on-one with our designers to create a truly original piece that reflects your personality.

services.title: Bespoke Tailoring
services.description: Precision-cut garments built to your exact measurements using the finest fabrics.

services.title: Alterations & Repairs
services.description: Give your favourite pieces a second life with expert alterations, resizing, and restoration.

services.title: Bridal & Occasion Wear
services.description: Bespoke bridal gowns, bridesmaids' dresses, and ceremony outfits for your most important days.

services.title: Corporate & Uniform
services.description: Professional corporate attire, branded uniforms, and team event outfits.

services.title: Fashion Consulting
services.description: Personal wardrobe audits, shopping guidance, and style planning sessions.

testimonials.name: Amara Okonkwo
testimonials.text: Zekiel Apparel brought my wedding vision to life beyond my wildest dreams. The attention to detail and craftsmanship was absolutely breathtaking. I felt like royalty on my special day!

testimonials.name: David Mensah
testimonials.text: I needed a custom suit for a very important corporate event. The team delivered something that was not only perfect in fit but also made a powerful statement. I got compliments all night!

testimonials.name: Fatima Al-Hassan
testimonials.text: The styling consultation alone was worth every penny. They completely transformed my wardrobe and gave me the confidence to express myself through fashion. I'm a client for life!

testimonials.name: Chisom Eze
testimonials.text: From the first consultation to the final fitting, Zekiel Apparel made the entire process enjoyable and stress-free. My graduation outfit was absolutely stunning and uniquely mine!

testimonials.name: Tola Adewale
testimonials.text: They made the most gorgeous aso-ebi outfits for my entire bridal party. Every single person looked amazing and consistent — the colour, the fit, the finishing. Exceptional!

testimonials.name: Kelechi Nwachukwu
testimonials.text: We ordered corporate uniforms for our entire team of 50. The professionalism, quality, and turnaround time were all outstanding. Our team has never looked so sharp.

discounts.title: New Client Special
discounts.description: Enjoy 15% off your first bespoke order with us.

discounts.title: Bridal Party Package
discounts.description: Book a bridal party of 6 or more and get 20% off the total.

faq.question: How long does a custom piece take to make?
faq.answer: Timelines vary by project complexity. Simple pieces may take 1–2 weeks, while elaborate designs like bridal gowns can take 4–8 weeks. We always confirm estimated timelines during your consultation.

faq.question: Do you work with fabrics I provide?
faq.answer: Yes! You're welcome to bring your own fabric. We'll assess its suitability and provide guidance on how best to work with it. We also stock a wide range of premium fabrics in our studio.

faq.question: How many fittings are included?
faq.answer: Most projects include 2–3 fitting sessions. We never finalise a garment until we're both happy with the fit. Additional fittings can be arranged as needed at no extra charge for major items.

faq.question: What areas do you serve?
faq.answer: Our studio is based in Abeokuta, Ogun State. We welcome clients nationally and can arrange virtual consultations and courier delivery for clients outside Ogun State.

faq.question: How do I get started?
faq.answer: Simply fill out the contact form on our Contact page or call us directly. We'll schedule a free initial consultation — in-person or virtual — to discuss your needs.
